CREATE TABLE users (id INT, name VARCHAR, birth_date TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO users VALUES (1, 'Alice', TIMESTAMPTZ '1990-01-01 00:00:00 UTC');
INSERT INTO users VALUES (2, 'Bob', TIMESTAMPTZ '1985-05-15 00:00:00 UTC');
SELECT name, age(birth_date) AS age FROM users;
SELECT name, age(birth_date) AS age FROM users WHERE age(birth_date) > INTERVAL '30 years';
CREATE TABLE orders (id INT, user_id INT, order_date TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO orders VALUES (1, 1, TIMESTAMPTZ '2020-06-01 10:00:00 UTC');
INSERT INTO orders VALUES (2, 2, TIMESTAMPTZ '2018-03-12 15:30:00 UTC');
SELECT u.name, age(u.birth_date) AS age, o.order_date FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE age(u.birth_date) < INTERVAL '40 years';
SELECT u.name, age(birth_date) AS age, o.order_date FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.order_date IS NULL;
SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM age(birth_date))) AS average_age FROM users;
SELECT DISTINCT age(birth_date) FROM users WHERE birth_date < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
WITH user_age AS (SELECT name, age(birth_date) AS age FROM users) SELECT age FROM user_age WHERE age > INTERVAL '25 years';
SELECT name, age(birth_date) AS age FROM users WHERE age(birth_date) = (SELECT MAX(age(birth_date)) FROM users);
